message:
🌱 Add localai: Add support for realtime API mission (#1090)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "localai-3714-add-support-for-realtime-api",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "localai: Add support for realtime API",
+    "description": "Add support for realtime API. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current localai deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your localai version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nhelm list -n localai 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working localai installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review localai configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant localai configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai\n```\nOpenAI just extended their API with realtime support with web sockets\n https://openai.com/index/introducing-the-realtime-api/?s=09\n\nLocalAI should support backends with voice capabilities and introduce a compatible API endpoint with OpenAI clients."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for realtime API",
+        "description": "**Description**\n\nThis PR changes model detection such as it is now considered also in the query (e.g. `?model=xx`) of the URL\n\nContext: extracted from #3714\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for realtime API\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "**Description**\n\nThis PR changes model detection such as it is now considered also in the query (e.g. `?model=xx`) of the URL\n\nContext: extracted from #3714",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "localai",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "localai"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI/issues/3714",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI/pull/3716"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with localai installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
